templates.text: The crown sits on you, {user}. Wear it like you mean it.
{user} — clan head of the day. Tomorrow, who knows. Maybe emperor.
Today the clan listens to one person, and that person is {user}.
AUF, brothers. The head of the day is {user}. Howl louder than usual.
Life is funny: yesterday a nobody, today the head of the clan. Congrats, {user}.
{user} found a crown where nobody else looked.
I do not know how you did it, {user}, but the clan picked you.
The strength of the wolf is the pack. The strength of {user} is that the pack believed in him today. AUF.
{user}, remember: great crown, great chat-management responsibility.
The clan is shocked: head of the day is {user}. Nobody saw it coming. Except {user}.
{user} is in charge today. Questions — tomorrow.
Lads, today we address {user} as 'your majesty'. Until 23:59 MSK.
Many in this clan are worthy. But the most worthy today is {user}.
{user} — new head of the day. Word is, they were not even surprised.
AUF. The alpha wolf today is {user}. Everyone else — backup vocals.
When life hands you a crown — wear it, {user}. When it does not — take one.
{user} is head of the day. Now they get to say 'good morning' first in the chat.
Disrespect the head of the day, disrespect the clan. {user}, we respect you.
You made it to the crown, kid. Well done, {user}. Someone had to.
{user} — choice of the pack. AUF AUF. Got a problem? Take it to the moon.
Today {user} is the voice of the clan. We listen carefully, even when they nod silently.
{user}, congratulations. You are elected head of the day. Please do not get a big head until midnight.
Head of the clan day — it is not a position, it is a diagnosis. Get well soon, {user}.
{user}, the crown is heavy. But you will pull through — we believe in you.
All in the clan are equal. But {user} is a bit more equal today.
AUF. {user}, you howl for everyone today. Do not let the pack down.
{user} — head of the day, by decree of the universe and the random number generator.
When I grow up, I want to be like {user}. For one day. Today.
{user}, your day. Use it wisely. For example, jokingly threaten to ban someone.
The crown found its owner. It is {user}. No further questions.
{user} — head of the clan. Sounds proud. Especially when said by {user}.
The clan picked {user} as head of the day. The clan knows what it is doing. Probably.
AUF brothers, {user} is leading the parade today. March in step.
{user}, your photo is on the clan board today. Tomorrow — on the wall of shame, just in case.
Head of the day — that is whoever was picked. Today {user} was picked. No hard feelings.
{user}, the crown looks good on you. Just do not let your ears grow because of it.
{user} — boss of the day. I mean head. The typo is intentional.
Some are born leaders. Some are {user}. Today they are the same.
The eyes of the pack are on {user}. So is the moon, by the way. AUF.
{user}, remember: with great length comes great responsibility.
Today {user} is in charge of the saucers. The saucers are the clan.
If there were an Oscar for clan head, {user} would take it. No jokes.
{user} — choice of the clan. The clan knows good choices.
Head of the clan day is like Santa. Once a day, guaranteed. Today — {user}.
AUF. {user} — top of the clan food chain. Until midnight.
{user}, today is your moment. Use it to go to bed at a reasonable hour.
Who thought {user} would become head? Nobody. Who is happy? Everyone.
{user}, by tradition you should now buy everyone tea. But we are not insisting.
The head of the day is {user}. Please do not applaud — silent respect is enough.
{user} took the crown. The crown took {user}. Symbiosis.
AUF. {user} on the throne today. But the throne opens up tomorrow — stay sharp.
{user}, congratulations on the crown. You may give it back tomorrow — but today is yours.
Life is short. The crown is shorter. Catch the moment, {user}.
{user} — one of us. Today, more so than usual.
Some look for meaning. {user} found it for a brief moment. Until midnight.
{user} — head of the day. Complaints — DM the clan.
AUF. The pack rises. {user} — its voice today. Listen quietly.
If the head is {user}, the clan is in solid hands. And in funny ones, too.
{user}, your move. The clan watches. The clan waits. The clan trusts. The clan is a tiny bit nervous.
When {user} became head of the day, time froze for a second. Then went on as usual.
{user}, today you are in charge. But do not abuse it, like, say, in the chat.
Head of the day — {user}. By decision of fate and the random number generator.
{user}, congratulations. Crown, length, respect — all yours. Until 00:00.
AUF. The wolf in charge today is {user}. The pack has no objections.
{user} — head of the day. It is destiny. Or a bug. Most likely destiny.
I do not believe in horoscopes, but if I did, I would say today belongs to {user}.
{user}, you are in the circle of clan honour. Do not fall — it is high up.
Head of the day — {user}. The name will be said often today. Lovingly or with a joke — we shall see.
{user} got the crown. It is a sign. Not sure of what, but it is a sign.
AUF brothers. {user} commands today. The pack agrees in silence.
{user}, today is yours. Tomorrow belongs to someone else. Cycle of clan life.
When the gods picked the clan head, they looked at {user} and said: 'Good enough'.
{user} — head of the day. Short, clean, our way.
The clan picked. The clan was right. Head of the day — {user}.
{user}, the crown fits like it was made for you. Maybe a bit tilted, but that is style.
AUF. The pack leader today is {user}. The moon approves. The moon approves of everything.
{user}, remember: head of the day is no reason to brag. But you can find a reason.
Today {user} is the face of the clan. Be kind, charismatic, witty. Just be {user}.
{user}, the crown is yours, your majesty. Tea service — at your own expense.
When the crown found {user}, it said: 'At last'. The crown was tired of looking too.
AUF. {user} — today's apex predator. Everyone else — extras.
{user}, congrats on the throne. Do not get cocky — thrones are temporary, ask anyone.
Today {user} is the symbol of the clan. Tomorrow it will be someone else. Life flows.
{user} — head of the day. Main accomplishment: it happened today, of all days.
The crown loves the strong. Today the crown loves {user}. Logical.
{user}, you are the chosen one. If anything — it wears off by midnight.
AUF AUF. {user} howls first today. The pack picks up.
When {user} got the crown, no one in the clan was surprised. Everyone knew it would happen. Eventually.
{user} — head of the clan day. Congratulations, plugs and shoutouts — in the comments.
Head of the clan — {user}. First name, last name, all in one. Our way.
{user} accepts congratulations. The line forms on the right. Patience required.
AUF. {user} is our moral compass today. Just not a moral hazard.
{user}, the crown on your head says: 'Found my person'. Trust the crown.
When I hear 'head of the clan day', I think of {user}. Today. Tomorrow — we shall see.
{user} — a heart's choice. The clan's heart. The clan kept its heart.
Head of the clan day — that is prestige, responsibility and +1..20 cm. {user}, you earned it.
{user}, today is your peak. Peak beauty, peak wisdom, peak length. Tomorrow — back to routine.
AUF. The moon whispers the name {user}. Quietly, so as not to jinx.
{user}, the crown is light because your head is light. Joking. The crown is heavy.
Head of the clan day — {user}. Period. Applause — in the evening, when the new head is chosen.
{user}, today you are the pride of the clan. Hopefully tomorrow too. But today — for sure.
When {user} woke up, they did not know they would be head of the clan. Now they know. Life is a surprise.
AUF. {user} — our alpha for 24 hours. Once the alpha cycle ends, we pick a new one.
{user}, the crown found you. Do not lose it. It is moody.
Today {user} is in charge of the saucers and everything else. Tomorrow — back to ordinary stuff.
{user} — head of the day. Not a bug, a feature. A very rare feature.
If the clan head is {user}, the clan can wait for a normal head until tomorrow. Joking.
AUF. {user} — choice of the pack. The pack voted unanimously. The pack always votes that way.
{user}, remember: with the crown comes length. With length comes attention. With attention comes responsibility.
Head of the clan day — {user}. Sounds like a title because it is one. Until midnight.
